title: How to Build an AI Agent with Claude Code (Claude AI Agent Tutorial)
summary: Tutorial on building AI agents using Claude Desktop without code or APIs. Covers three levels of Claude interaction, the role of CLAUDE.md configuration files, planning mode to prevent hallucination, and common pitfalls in agent workflow design. Demonstrates two live agent builds with emphasis on process, uncertainty handling, and deliberate action.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through building AI agents with Claude Desktop, without code or APIs. It maps three levels of Claude interaction, explains the role of CLAUDE.md configuration files, and shows how planning mode reduces hallucination by forcing deliberate action before execution. Two live agent builds anchor the process, with attention to uncertainty handling and the common pitfalls of agent workflow design.
